# services.wastebin

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.wastebin`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.wastebin.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wastebin, a pastebin service. |
| `services.wastebin.package` | `package` | The wastebin package to use. |
| `services.wastebin.secretFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to file containing sensitive environment variables. Some variables that can be considered secrets are: - WASTEBIN_PASSWORD_SALT: salt used to hash user passwords used for encrypting pastes. - WASTEBIN_SIGNING_KEY: sets the key to sign cookies. If not set, a random key will be generated which means cookies will become invalid after restarts and paste creators will not be able to delete their pastes anymore. |
| `services.wastebin.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Additional configuration for wastebin, see <https://github.com/matze/wastebin#usage> for supported values. For secrets use secretFile option instead. |
| `services.wastebin.settings.RUST_LOG` | `string` | Influences logging. Besides the typical trace, debug, info etc. keys, you can also set the tower_http key to some log level to get additional information request and response logs. |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_ADDRESS_PORT` | `string` | Address and port to bind to |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_BASE_URL` | `string` | Base URL for the QR code display. If not set, the user agent's Host header field is used as an approximation. |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_CACHE_SIZE` | `signed integer` | Number of rendered syntax highlight items to cache. Can be disabled by setting to 0. |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_DATABASE_PATH` | `string` | Path to the sqlite3 database file. If not set, an in-memory database is used. |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_HTTP_TIMEOUT` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of seconds a request can be processed until wastebin responds with 408 |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_MAX_BODY_SIZE` | `signed integer` | Number of bytes to accept for POST requests |
| `services.wastebin.settings.WASTEBIN_TITLE` | `string` | Overrides the HTML page title |
| `services.wastebin.stateDir` | `absolute path` | State directory of the daemon. |
